info.name: Apico API Tests
info.description:
Complete test suite for the Apico REST API testing tool backend. Run this collection to verify all endpoints are working correctly.

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Import the environment file (apico-local.postman_environment.json)
3. Select the environment
4. Run folder '01 - Auth' first
5. Then run remaining folders in order

## Order Matters!
Folders must be run in numbered order because each folder depends on variables set by previous folders.

## Expected Results
~72 requests total
Assertions depend on enabled tests
All should pass on a fresh database with backend running on localhost:4000

item.name: 01 - Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, token refresh, and logout

item.name: Register User
item.description: Creates a new user account. Automatically saves ACCESS_TOKEN and REFRESH_TOKEN to environment variables.

exec: // Ensure a unique email each run to avoid duplicate-user 400

item.name: Register Duplicate (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to register with the same email. Should fail with 400.

item.name: Login User
item.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. Returns new access and refresh tokens.

item.name: Login Wrong Password (expect 401)
item.description: Attempts to login with incorrect password. Should fail with 401.

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: Uses refresh token to get a new access token.

item.name: Logout
item.description: Logs out the current user and invalidates the access token.

item.name: 02 - Workspaces
item.description: Workspace management endpoints

item.name: Create Workspace
item.description: Creates a new workspace for the current user.

item.name: Get All Workspaces
item.description: Retrieves all workspaces the current user has access to.

item.name: Get Workspace By ID
item.description: Retrieves a specific workspace by its ID.

item.name: Get Invalid Workspace (expect 403)
item.description: Attempts to access a workspace that doesn't exist or belongs to another user.

item.name: Invite Member to Workspace
item.description: Invites a user to a workspace with a specified role.

item.name: Get Workspace Members
item.description: Retrieves all members for a workspace.

exec: const other = json.data.find((m) => m.user?.id && m.user.id !== currentUserId)

item.name: Get Workspace Invites
item.description: Retrieves all invites for a workspace.

item.name: Revoke Workspace Invite
item.description: Revokes a pending workspace invite.

item.name: Remove Workspace Member
item.description: Removes a member from the workspace.

item.name: Update Workspace Member Role
item.description: Updates a workspace member role.

item.name: Leave Workspace
item.description: Leaves the current workspace.

item.name: Import Workspace (Apico)
item.description: Imports Apico export payload into the workspace.

item.name: 03 - Collections
item.description: Request collection management endpoints

item.name: Create Collection
item.description: Creates a new request collection in a workspace.

item.name: Get Collections in Workspace
item.description: Retrieves all collections in a workspace.

item.name: Update Collection
item.description: Updates collection metadata like name.

item.name: Reorder Collections
item.description: Reorders collections by updating order and folder placement.

item.name: Delete Collection
item.description: Deletes a collection (test with a temporary collection first).

item.name: Create Collection (Base)
item.description: Creates a new request collection (base route).

item.name: Get Collections (Base)
item.description: Retrieves all collections (base route).

item.name: Update Collection (Workspace Route)
item.description: Updates a collection using the workspace route.

item.name: Delete Collection (Workspace Route)
item.description: Deletes a collection using the workspace route.

item.name: Reorder Collections (Workspace Route)
item.description: Reorders collections using the workspace route.

item.name: 04 - Saved Requests
item.description: Saved request endpoints

item.name: Create Collection (for requests)
item.description: Temporary collection for saving test requests.

item.name: Save Request to Collection
item.description: Saves an HTTP request to a collection for later reuse.

item.name: Get Saved Requests
item.description: Retrieves all saved requests in a collection.

item.name: Update Saved Request
item.description: Updates a previously saved request.

item.name: Update Request Tags
item.description: Replaces tags for a request.

item.name: Search Requests
item.description: Searches saved requests by query string.

item.name: Reorder Requests
item.description: Reorders requests within a collection.

item.name: Delete Saved Request
item.description: Deletes a saved request from a collection.

item.name: 05 - Execute Request
item.description: Request execution endpoints that proxy to external APIs

item.name: Execute GET (no auth)
item.description: Executes an HTTP GET request through the Apico proxy. Tests that the backend can successfully make external API calls.

item.name: Execute GET (with token)
item.description: Executes a GET request with authentication token from environment.

item.name: Execute POST with Body
item.description: Executes a POST request with JSON body.

item.name: Execute with Query Params
item.description: Executes a request with query parameters, testing parameter handling.

item.name: Execute with Bearer Auth
item.description: Executes a request with Bearer token authentication.

item.name: Execute with Basic Auth
item.description: Executes a request with Basic authentication.

item.name: Execute Invalid URL (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to execute a request with an invalid URL.

item.name: Execute as Guest (no JWT)
item.description: Tests the /execute endpoint without authentication. Guest users can execute requests but history is not saved.

item.name: 06 - Request History
item.description: Request history endpoints

item.name: Get History
item.description: Retrieves all request history for the current user.

item.name: Delete History Entry
item.description: Deletes a single history entry.

item.name: Clear All History
item.description: Clears all request history for the current user.

item.name: 07 - Shared Links
item.description: Request sharing and public access endpoints

item.name: Save Request First
item.description: Save a request to use for sharing tests

item.name: Create Shared Link
item.description: Creates a shareable link for a request.

item.name: Create Shared Link with Expiry
item.description: Creates a shareable link with an expiration date.

item.name: Get Shared Request (public)
item.description: Tests the public share endpoint. No Authorization header � simulates a non-logged-in user viewing a shared link.

item.name: Create Collection Share Link
item.description: Creates a shareable link for a collection.

item.name: Get Shared Collection (public)
item.description: Retrieves a shared collection by public token.

item.name: Create Collection Share Link (Workspace Route)
item.description: Creates a shareable link for a collection (workspace route).

item.name: Get Shared Collection (public, Workspace Route)
item.description: Retrieves a shared collection by public token (workspace route).

item.name: 08 - Environments
item.description: Environment and variable management endpoints

item.name: Create Environment
item.description: Creates a new environment for storing variables.

item.name: Get Environments
item.description: Retrieves all environments in a workspace.

item.name: Get Environment by ID
item.description: Retrieves a specific environment with all its variables.

item.name: Update Environment
item.description: Updates environment metadata like name.

item.name: Bulk Update Variables
item.description: Updates multiple environment variables at once.

body.raw: {"variables": [{"key": "BASE_URL","value": "localhost:4000","enabled": true,"isSecret": false},{"key": "API_TOKEN","value": "my-secret-token","enabled": true,"isSecret": true},{"key": "VERSION","value": "v1","enabled": true,"isSecret": false}]}

item.name: Delete Environment
item.description: Deletes an environment and all its variables.

item.name: Create Environment (Base)
item.description: Creates a new environment (base route).

item.name: Get Environments (Base)
item.description: Retrieves all environments (base route).

item.name: Get Environment by ID (Workspace Route)
item.description: Retrieves an environment by ID using the workspace route.

item.name: Update Environment (Workspace Route)
item.description: Updates environment metadata using the workspace route.

item.name: Bulk Update Variables (Workspace Route)
item.description: Bulk updates environment variables using the workspace route.

body.raw: {"variables": [{"key": "BASE_URL","value": "localhost:4000","enabled": true,"isSecret": false},{"key": "API_TOKEN","value": "my-secret-token","enabled": true,"isSecret": true},{"key": "VERSION","value": "v1","enabled": true,"isSecret": false}]}

item.name: Delete Environment (Workspace Route)
item.description: Deletes an environment using the workspace route.

item.name: 09 - Folders
item.description: Folder management endpoints

item.name: Create Folder
item.description: Creates a new folder in a workspace.

item.name: Get Folders
item.description: Retrieves all folders in a workspace.

item.name: Reorder Folders
item.description: Reorders folders within a workspace.

item.name: Update Folder
item.description: Updates folder name or parent.

item.name: Delete Folder
item.description: Deletes a folder.

item.name: 10 - Edge Cases
item.description: Error handling and security edge cases

item.name: No Auth Header (expect 401)
item.description: Attempts to access protected resource without authentication.

item.name: Invalid JWT (expect 401)
item.description: Attempts to use a malformed JWT token.

item.name: Missing Required Fields (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to register without required fields.

item.name: Access Other User Data (expect 403)
item.description: Attempts to access workspace belonging to another user.

item.name: Invalid Email (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to register with an invalid email.

item.name: Update Environment Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update an environment without a name.

item.name: Get Shared Collection Invalid Token (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to fetch a shared collection with an invalid token.

item.name: Short Password (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to register with a short password.

item.name: Login Invalid Email Format (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to login with an invalid email format.

item.name: Refresh Missing Token (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to refresh without refreshToken.

item.name: Refresh Invalid Token (expect 401)
item.description: Attempts to refresh with an invalid refresh token.

item.name: Create Workspace Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to create a workspace without a name.

item.name: Create Collection Invalid Folder (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to create a collection with a non-existent folderId.

item.name: Bulk Update Variables Missing Key (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update variables with a missing key.

item.name: Get Shared Request Invalid Token (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to fetch a shared request with an invalid token.

item.name: Invite Member Invalid Role (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to invite a member with an invalid role.

item.name: Update Member Role Invalid (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to set an invalid member role.

item.name: Create Folder Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to create a folder without a name.

item.name: Create Tag Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to create a tag without a name.

item.name: Save Request Invalid URL (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to save a request with an invalid URL.

item.name: Execute Request Invalid URL (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to execute a request with an invalid URL.

item.name: Update Request Tags Invalid Body (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update request tags with invalid payload.

item.name: Reorder Requests Missing Order (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to reorder requests with invalid payload.

item.name: Reorder Folders Missing Order (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to reorder folders with invalid payload.

item.name: Create Environment Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to create an environment without a name.

item.name: Share Request Invalid Expiry (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to share a request with invalid expiry.

item.name: Share Collection Invalid Expiry (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to share a collection with invalid expiry.

item.name: Register Empty Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to register with an empty name.

item.name: Login Missing Password (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to login without a password.

item.name: Refresh With Access Token (expect 401)
item.description: Attempts to refresh using an access token instead of refresh token.

item.name: Invite Member Invalid Email (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to invite with an invalid email.

item.name: Invite Member Missing Role (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to invite without a role.

item.name: Update Member Role Missing Role (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update member role without role field.

item.name: Remove Member Invalid ID (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to remove a non-existent member.

item.name: Create Collection Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to create a collection without a name.

item.name: Update Collection Empty Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update collection with empty name.

item.name: Reorder Collections Missing Order (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to reorder collections with invalid payload.

item.name: Save Request Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to save a request without a name.

item.name: Save Request Invalid Method (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to save a request with invalid method.

item.name: Update Request Invalid Method (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update a request with invalid method.

item.name: Search Missing WorkspaceId (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to search without workspaceId.

item.name: Execute Request Invalid Method (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to execute with invalid HTTP method.

item.name: Execute Request Missing Headers Params (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to execute without headers/params arrays.

item.name: Update Folder Self Parent (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to set folder parentId to itself.

item.name: Reorder Folders Self Parent (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to set folder parentId to itself during reorder.

item.name: Update Tag Missing Name (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update a tag without name.

item.name: Delete Tag Invalid ID (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to delete a tag that does not exist.

item.name: Bulk Update Variables Invalid Types (expect 400)
item.description: Attempts to update variables with invalid types.

item.name: Update Environment Invalid ID (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to update non-existent environment.

item.name: Delete History Invalid ID (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to delete non-existent history entry.

item.name: Get Invite Invalid Token (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to get invite with invalid token.

item.name: Accept Invite Invalid Token (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to accept invite with invalid token.

item.name: Decline Invite Invalid Token (expect 404)
item.description: Attempts to decline invite with invalid token.

item.name: Setup Member User (Register)
item.description: Creates a secondary member user for role/permission tests.

item.name: Login Member User
item.description: Logs in the member user and stores MEMBER_ACCESS_TOKEN.

item.name: Invite Member as Viewer
item.description: Invites the member user as VIEWER.

item.name: Accept Invite as Member
item.description: Accepts the invite using member token.

item.name: Accept Invite Twice (expect 410)
item.description: Accepting the same invite again should fail (idempotency).

item.name: Owner Cannot Change Own Role (expect 400)
item.description: Owner cannot change their own role.

item.name: Owner Cannot Remove Self (expect 400)
item.description: Owner cannot remove themselves from workspace.

item.name: Invite Existing Member (expect 400)
item.description: Inviting an already-member user should fail.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Invite Members (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot invite members.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Create Collection (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot create collections.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Create Folder (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot create folders.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Create Tag (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot create tags.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Create Environment (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot create environments.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Import Workspace (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot import workspace data.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Update Member Role (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot update member roles.

item.name: Viewer Cannot Remove Member (expect 403)
item.description: Viewer role cannot remove members.

item.name: Clear History (Idempotent) #1
item.description: Clears history (first call).

item.name: Clear History (Idempotent) #2
item.description: Clears history again (should still succeed).

item.name: Logout (Idempotent) #1
item.description: Logout once.

item.name: Logout (Idempotent) #2
item.description: Logout again (should still succeed).

item.name: 11 - Tags
item.description: Tag management endpoints

item.name: Create Tag
item.description: Creates a new tag in a workspace.

item.name: Get Tags
item.description: Retrieves all tags in a workspace.

item.name: Update Tag
item.description: Updates a tag name.

item.name: Delete Tag
item.description: Deletes a tag.

item.description: Workspace invite endpoints

item.name: Get Pending Invites
item.description: Gets pending invites for the current user.

item.name: Get Invite by Token
item.description: Gets invite details by public token.

item.name: Accept Invite
item.description: Accepts a workspace invite.

item.name: Decline Invite
item.description: Declines a workspace invite.

item.name: 13 - Health
item.description: Health check

item.name: Health Check
item.description: Basic API health check.
